name: Tokyo Kaiki Zake
overview:
Let’s drink between everyday and extraordinary !!! Toru Seino has a lot of terrifying “ghost stories” that he heard directly from his friends, acquaintances and others. Why don’t you actually go to the mysterious scene and drink “liquor”?

I want to see “ghosts” because it’s okay to call them once. But scary … but I want to see … scary scary ..

trailers.title: ドラマ25 東京怪奇酒 | 第1話 | 主演 杉野遥亮 | テレビ東京
